body:
## OpenCode Review — APPROVED

All checklist items pass. Merging.

### Checklist

| # | Criterion | Result |
|---|-----------|--------|
| 1 | Web Audio API only, no new npm deps | **PASS** — only native `AudioContext` / `OscillatorNode` / `GainNode`; no `package.json` changes |
| 2 | `SoundManager.ts` with `play(name, volume?)` | **PASS** — signature is `play(name: string, volume = 0.2): void` |
| 3 | Muted by default, M key toggles | **PASS** — `enabled = false` on init; M/m keydown calls `toggle()` and logs to chat |
| 4 | Called from GameClient on DAMAGE, craft, death | **PASS** — `hit` on DAMAGE handler, `death` on DEATH packet, `craft` on successful CRAFT_RESULT |
| 5 | No apparent TypeScript errors | **PASS** — types are correct; `Math.max(80, freq * 0.7)` guard prevents `exponentialRampToValueAtTime` receiving 0 which would throw a RangeError |

### Notes

- `AudioContext` is lazily created on first `toggle()` — correctly defers until a user gesture, avoiding browser autoplay policy violations.
- `eat` frequency is defined in the freq map but has no call site yet (food-use R-key is still an open issue per AGENTS.md) — harmless dead code, fine to ship now.
- No `ctx.close()` on teardown; acceptable for a tab-lifetime browser game.

No changes requested. Squash-merging now.
